landing.heroTitle: Compare building material prices across suppliers
landing.heroText: Materiaalitukku compares building material prices and freight to Finland — see instantly where ordering pays off.
landing.ctaSubmit: Are you a supplier? Add your products
landing.step1Text: Browse items by category or search by name.
landing.step2Text: See each supplier's unit price, wholesale price and freight to Finland — the true delivered price.
landing.step3Text: Contact the supplier and arrange transport, for example through our partners.

transport.title: Transport companies
transport.intro: Transport partners on routes from the Baltics and Europe to Finland.

submitForm.title: Add products
submitForm.intro: Are you a supplier? Send in your products and prices — an admin reviews them before publishing.
submitForm.transportSmall: Freight to Finland, small order (€, optional)
submitForm.transportBulk: Freight to Finland, bulk order (€, optional)

admin.title: Admin — review queue
admin.approveNote: Approving automatically creates the supplier (matched by email), the product and the offer.
